critiques.title: Clarify control-plane vs runtime boundary
critiques.finding: The project contains runtime-adjacent APIs but live execution remains disabled, which should be more visible in the README.
critiques.recommendation: Add boundary callouts to README and site navigation.

critiques.title: Tenant storage should remain non-production labeled
critiques.finding: Tenant-scoped local JSON storage is useful for demo but should not be mistaken for production isolation.
critiques.recommendation: Keep explicit warnings in storage docs and release notes.
